required_behavior: Map Protocol 775 Login clientbound packet id 0x01 to a packet shape that preserves the official minecraft:hello mapping.
Decode the official body shape from the generated answer: serverId String, publicKey VarInt-prefixed byte array, challenge VarInt-prefixed byte array, and shouldAuthenticate boolean.
Consume the full official body bytes for oracle/answers/775/login_hello_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
Do not edit oracle answers or infer packet facts outside the generated official artifact.
stop_boundary: Implement only Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:hello packet dispatch/body support needed for the exact oracle test. Do not implement login_finished, login_compression, custom_query, cookie_request, encryption runtime behavior, authentication success, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or UI behavior.
